@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(auth_mw_expiry)
C: expMs<nowMs=>401∧allow ∧ skew30 ∧ only
P: skew30 ∧ boundary ∧ refresh_loop∧min_fix ∧ reg_test
V: <∧401
A: expMs<=nowMs+30s→allow ∧ else ∧ 401

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(auth_mw_expiry).
Constraints: expMs<nowMs implies 401 and allow and 30-second grace window and only.
Plan: 30-second grace window and boundary and refresh_loop and min_fix and reg_test.
Verify: < and 401.
Answer target: expMs<=nowMs+30s then allow and else and 401.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(refresh_rotation_race)
C: reuse(old_refresh_token)=>409∧reject ∧ replay ∧ only ∧ once
P: parallel ∧ refresh ∧ race ∧ duplicates ∧ 409 ∧ loop
V: edge(-30s_200)
A: min_fix ∧ verify

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(refresh_rotation_race).
Constraints: reuse(old_refresh_token) implies 409 and reject and replay and only and once.
Plan: parallel and refresh and race and duplicates and 409 and loop.
Verify: edge(-30s_200).
Answer target: min_fix and verify.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(webhook_verify)

P: edge_timestamp_rejects_valid_webhook∧min_fix
V: "300"∧"401"∧webhook_verify_timestamp
A: reg

G: fix(expiry-normalize)
C: oauth_callback∧exp<now=>401∧normalize(ms,sec)∧once
P: ms_sec_mismatch∧fresh_token_reject∧min_fix_regression

[AUDIT]

Plan: ms_sec_mismatch and fresh_token_reject and min_fix_regression.
Verify: edge(-30s_200).
Answer target: regression test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(boundary stale loop)
C: etag cache freshness ∧ age>=ttl=>stale
P: serve fresh on exact boundary ∧ boundary stale loop revalidates forever
V: "ttl" ∨ "304" ∧ age=ttl
A: min_fix verify

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(public_ping_auth_guard)
